platformFee.note: P31 Labs charges no platform fee. This file is the authoritative, CI-verified disclosure. Any change requires a commit and a passing verify:economy run.

paymentProcessing.processorFeeCard: 2.9% + $0.30 per successful charge (Stripe standard rate, not set by P31 Labs)
paymentProcessing.note: Processor fees are set by Stripe and paid directly to Stripe. P31 Labs does not mark them up.

revenueShare.note: Creators retain 100% of gross revenue minus processor fees. P31 Labs takes no revenue share in schema version 1.0.0.

geodesicRoom.note: K4 live rooms are free. No paywall, no in-room purchases, no ads. Public rooms are open by room ID.

transparency.changePolicy: Any fee change requires: (1) commit to this file, (2) passing verify:economy in CI, (3) 30-day advance notice post to https://p31ca.org/changelog before taking effect.
